name: Tuscan Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes in boiling salted water until just tender.
2. Drain the potatoes.
3. While the potatoes are still hot, stir in the remaining ingredients: Parmesan cheese, ricotta cheese, mashed garlic, thinly sliced red onion, olive oil, cider vinegar, salt to taste, and fresh parsley.
4. Chill before serving.
